description:
A Quotations / Affirmations App Widget
Enhance your daily routine with this easy-to-use app widget, featuring:

• High-quality, curated quotations
• Single-tap access to Wikipedia source articles
• Offline core functionality
• Extensive customisation options
• Simple, intuitive navigation
• Affirmation import feature
• Timely notifications
• Local or remote backup/restore

• User feedback drives development and is always appreciated!
